options.text: No worries—just resend it when you can.
I don't care why you're late—just get it done.
Why didn't you back up your files?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'No worries—just resend it when you can.' 体现了理解与宽容，适合非正式职场场景。干扰项 'That's unacceptable...' 和 'I don't care...' 过于强硬，不符合礼貌解释延迟的语境。'Why didn't you...' 是指责而非支持，会加剧对方压力。
content.speakerText: Sorry I haven't sent the report—my laptop crashed last night.
content.speakerTextCn: 抱歉没发报告，我昨晚电脑崩了。

options.text: That's understandable. Please update me once it's sent.
You should have predicted this change.
Don't worry about it—just ignore the client.
I'm busy right now, send it to my assistant.

content.explanation: 正确答案体现了专业支持与跟进意识，符合正式职场沟通。干扰项 'You should have...' 是指责，缺乏同理心；'ignore the client' 不专业；'send it to my assistant' 回避责任，不符合协作精神。
content.speakerText: I apologize for the delay—the client changed the requirements again.
content.speakerTextCn: 很抱歉延迟了，客户又改了需求。
